        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C');
        prefix_T[i+1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] == 'T');
    }
    // Precompute suffix arrays
    vector<int> suffix_C(n+1, 0);
    vector<int> suffix_T(n+1, 0);

        suffix_C[i] = suffix_C[i+1] + (s[i] == 'C');
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T');
    }
    // Compute original count

    // Compute max_L

        if (val > max_T) max_T = val;
    }
    return original + max(max_L, max_C, max_T);
